text: OpenAI was founded in San Francisco in 2015 by Sam Altman, Greg Brockman, Ilya Sutskever, Wojciech Zaremba, John Schulman, and Elon Musk. OpenAI researches large language models and released ChatGPT in 2022. Microsoft invested in OpenAI and provides Azure cloud infrastructure for OpenAI workloads.

Microsoft was founded by Bill Gates and Paul Allen in 1975. Microsoft develops Windows, Office, Azure, and GitHub Copilot. Microsoft acquired GitHub in 2018 and uses Azure as a major cloud platform for AI services.

Google was founded by Larry Page and Sergey Brin in 1998. Google is owned by Alphabet and develops Search, Android, YouTube, Google Cloud, and Gemini. Google acquired DeepMind in 2014 and later combined Google Brain with DeepMind to accelerate AI research.
DeepMind was founded in London in 2010 by Demis Hassabis, Shane Legg, and Mustafa Suleyman. DeepMind created AlphaGo and contributes to Gemini research after becoming part of Google and Alphabet.

Meta Platforms was founded by Mark Zuckerberg and other cofounders in 2004 as Facebook. Meta owns Instagram and WhatsApp and operates the Facebook AI Research group, also known as FAIR. Meta develops open AI models including the Llama family.

NVIDIA was founded in 1993 by Jensen Huang, Chris Malachowsky, and Curtis Priem. NVIDIA designs GPUs and the CUDA software platform. NVIDIA GPUs are widely used to train and run large AI models for companies such as OpenAI, Google, Meta, and Tesla.

Amazon was founded by Jeff Bezos in 1994 and operates AWS. AWS provides cloud computing infrastructure and AI services. Amazon invested in Anthropic, and Anthropic uses AWS Trainium and Inferentia chips for some AI workloads.
Anthropic was founded in 2021 by Dario Amodei, Daniela Amodei, and other former OpenAI employees. Anthropic develops the Claude assistant family. Google and Amazon have both invested in Anthropic.

Tesla was founded in 2003 by Martin Eberhard and Marc Tarpenning, and Elon Musk later became its CEO. Tesla develops electric vehicles and autonomous driving systems. Elon Musk founded xAI in 2023, and xAI develops the Grok assistant.

Apple was founded by Steve Jobs, Steve Wozniak, and Ronald Wayne in 1976. Apple designs iPhone, Mac, and Apple Silicon chips. Apple uses machine learning in products such as Siri, Photos, and on-device intelligence features.

TSMC was founded by Morris Chang in 1987 in Taiwan. TSMC manufactures advanced semiconductors for customers including Apple, NVIDIA, AMD, and many AI hardware companies. TSMC is a key supplier for chips used in modern AI infrastructure.

GitHub was founded by Tom Preston-Werner, Chris Wanstrath, PJ Hyett, and Scott Chacon in 2008. Microsoft acquired GitHub in 2018. GitHub Copilot uses OpenAI models and is delivered as a developer productivity tool inside GitHub and code editors.
